title: PPG: Good Performance, But Not 'Outperformance'
text: PPG Industries has underperformed the S&P 500 but has remained in the green. The company has seen improvements in operating cash flow, adjusted EPS, and top-line sales in Q2 2023. PPG's future is uncertain due to weaknesses in non-automotive and aerospace-related industrial sectors and the potential slowdown of growth in China.

title: PPG opens customer and employee experience center at global headquarters, marks 140th anniversary
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced the opening of a customer and employee experience center at its global headquarters in Pittsburgh (Video available here).The center showcases innovative paints, coatings and specialty materials and technologies from across the organization. title: Introducing Limitless: GLIDDEN Paint by PPG's ‘Anything but Yellow' 2024 Color of the Year
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced GLIDDEN® paint by PPG's 2024 Color of the Year: Limitless (PPG1091-3), a fresh warm hue that holds both the power of a primary color and the essence of a neutral. title: PPG names Limitless as 2024 Color of the Year, inspiring endless possibilities
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE: PPG) today announced Limitless (PPG1091-3) as its 2024 Color of the Year. This contemporary honey beige shade offers infinite design and styling possibilities for residential and commercial interiors and exteriors. consumer products and industrial applications. title: PPG, PPG Foundation to invest $5 million in environmental sustainability education
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE:PPG) and the PPG Foundation today announced a commitment to invest $5 million by 2030 in environmental sustainability education. Aligning with PPG's 2030 sustainability targets and priorities, the new commitment will strengthen support of the next generation of innovators and maximize the impact within communities where PPG operates. title: The Ultimate 10 Retirement Salvation Dividend Aristocrats For August
text: The answer is simple for those worried about high market valuations hurting future returns. Don't buy overvalued stocks. title: PPG recognized for strong sustainability practices by FTSE4Good for fifth consecutive year
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced its inclusion in the FTSE4Good Index Series for the fifth consecutive year.
